rules.rule: every generated asset MUST carry a deterministic variant_id derived from sha256(generation_request_id|variant_index|sha256(asset_bytes)).
every generated asset MUST cite generation_request_id, prompt_revision_id, grounding_id, synthesis_id.
every generated asset MUST carry sha256 of the asset bytes (provenance).
variant family (siblings sharing generation_request_id) is reviewer-comparable; cross-family comparison requires explicit reviewer attestation.
regeneration MUST preserve grounding_id; grounding-changing regeneration requires a new grounding manifest first (layer 42).
OEM assets MUST be labeled trust_tier=OEM and source_provenance.kind='oem-source'; generated/OEM differentiation is non-negotiable.
edited assets MUST cite parent_asset_id and edit_kind ∈ {crop, annotate, redact, color-correct, watermark-removal-FORBIDDEN}.
